reviews.comment:
PESIMO más de 1 hora para cargar combustible 1 solo playero para 4 surtidores más de 50 autos para esperar cargar NO LO RECOMIENDO PARA NADA

(Translated by Google)
TERRIBLE. Over an hour to fill up. Only one attendant for four pumps. More than 50 cars waiting to fill up. I DO NOT RECOMMEND IT AT ALL.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzaUkyMW5nRRAB

reviews.comment:
Típica estacion de servicio del acá, moderna y cuidada, el personal de playa muy amables y al igual que el encargado del bufett están sobrepasados de clientes, y se producen bastantes demoras, poner más personal en el shop

(Translated by Google)
Typical local service station, modern and well-maintained. The forecourt staff are very friendly, but like the buffet manager, they are overwhelmed with customers, causing significant delays. They should hire more staff in the shop.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzcjgtZE5nEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Falta que hagan baños nuevos para mujeres. Falta mejorar la atención en el restaurante, la comida muy rica.

(Translated by Google)
They need to build new women's restrooms. The service at the restaurant needs to be improved; the food is delicious.
